# Planned Features for Future Releases (0.1.3+)

### 1. Command Cooldowns
Prevent players from spamming commands directly through the framework.
* Add a `@Cooldown(seconds = 5)` annotation.
* The framework automatically manages the timings per-player and sends a localized *"You must wait X seconds before using this again"* message.
* Include an auto-generated bypass permission (e.g., `command.bypass.cooldown`).

### 2. Help Menu Pagination
We added beautiful pagination to the `Auto GUI` feature, but the text-based `/command help` menu still prints all subcommands into chat in one massive block.
* Automatically paginate the text help menu (e.g., `/command help 2`) if there are more than 7 subcommands.
* Add clickable Kyori Adventure text components (e.g., `[< Next Page >]`) to navigate through the help menu interactively.

### 3. Command Flags / Switches
Many commands need optional behavior toggles (like a silent mode).
* Let developers write: `public void teleport(Player target, @Flag("-s") boolean silent)`
* If a player types `/tp Dami -s`, the `silent` boolean automatically becomes `true` without messing up the argument indexes for other parameters.
